module.name: distribution
module.description: A normal (bell) curve (SVG) with the axis, mean line, and an optional shaded region between two values — for illustrating probability / confidence areas.
module.aiSpec:
A NORMAL DISTRIBUTION bell curve (schematic, not data-driven) for illustrating probability regions, confidence intervals, p-values, and tail areas. Takes NO body — everything comes from parameters.
When NOT to use: for plotting real data use @chartjs (bar/line/scatter); for an arbitrary y=f(x) curve use @funcplot. This module only draws a Gaussian.
Parameters: - `mean` : centre of the curve (x of the peak). Default 0. Any real number. - `sd` : standard deviation (spread). Default 1. Must be > 0 (negatives are treated as their absolute value). - `from` : left edge of the shaded region, an x-value. Blank = auto (open left tail down to the curve's left end). Use a large number for +/-infinity. - `to` : right edge of the shaded region, an x-value. Blank = auto (open right tail). Give `from` and/or `to` to shade an area; omit both for no shade. - `label` : caption drawn over the shaded area (e.g. "5%"). Default none. - `color` : curve stroke and fill accent. Default var(--accent-color). Any CSS color. - `showmean` : true/false — draw the dashed mean line. Default true. - `align` : left | center | right — horizontal placement of the figure. Default center. - `maxwidth` : max figure width in px. Default 440. Range 120–1200. - `fill` : shaded-region opacity as a percent. Default 30. Range 0–100.
`from`/`to` are x-values on the same scale as `mean`/`sd` (blank = auto tail).
<!-- @distribution mean: 0, sd: 1, from: 1.64, to: 99, label: 5% tail, maxwidth: 360 -->

param.name: mean
param.label: Mean
param.desc: Centre of the curve (x of the peak); any real number.

param.name: sd
param.label: Std. deviation
param.desc: Spread of the curve; must be greater than 0.

param.name: from
param.label: Shade from
param.desc: Left x of the shaded area; blank = auto (open left tail).

param.name: to
param.label: Shade to
param.desc: Right x of the shaded area; blank = auto (open right tail).

param.name: label
param.label: Region label
param.desc: Caption drawn over the shaded area, e.g. 5%.

param.name: color
param.label: Color
param.desc: Curve stroke and fill accent color.

param.name: showmean
param.label: Show mean line
param.desc: Draw the dashed vertical line at the mean.

param.name: align
param.label: Alignment
param.desc: Horizontal placement of the figure on the slide.

param.name: maxwidth
param.label: Max width (px)
param.desc: Maximum rendered width of the figure.

snippet.label: Normal distribution (shaded)
snippet.text: <!-- @distribution mean: 0, sd: 1, from: 1.64, to: 99, label: 5% tail -->
snippet.description: Bell curve with an optional shaded region between "from" and "to".
